titleStmt.title: SII 9.133: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 133. (A.R. No. 514 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE SOMESVARA TEMPLE AT CHINNATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 990, Kīlaka, Mārgaśira, puṇṇami, Śukravāra, Sōma-grahaṇa In the year Kīlaka, Mārgaśira-puṇṇami fell on Wednesday, 12th November A.D. 1068 and there was no lunar eclipse on that day. But Bhādrapada-pūrṇimā of the year was a Friday and there was a lunar eclipse on that day = A.D. 1068 August 15. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Bhuvanaikamalladēva and mentions his brother and feudatory Trailōkyamalla-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permāḍi Jayasiṅghadēva “lord of Kāñchī” as ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirty two-thousand and Sindavāḍi thousand from Kampile. It records that, for the service of the god Dakshiṇa-Sōmēśvaradēva of Tumbuḷa, a grant of 250 mattars of land was made to Chandrabhūshaṇa-Paṇḍita, disciple of Anantaśakti-Paṇḍita, who was the disciple of the Kālāmukha teacher Nirañjana-Paṇḍita; 30 mattars of land were given for imparting education; one tank, 50 houses, 30 mattars and 4 oil-mills for the service of the god Nārāyaṇadēva; 10 mattars to the worshipper; 40 mattars to other servants; 15 mattars to the musicians; and 3 mattars to the garland-maker.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaykamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpriyā
nuja svasti samastabhuvanastutamahāmahimōdayō(r)llasitapallavā
nvaya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara kāṁcīpuravarēśvara vidagdhavi
ḷāsinīviḷōcanacakōracaṁdra pratyakṣadēvēṁdraṁ vikrāntakaṇṭhīravaṁ
maṇḍaḷikabhairavaṁ saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ cāḷukyadikkuṁjaraṁ vandibrinda
santarppaṇaṁ vijayalakṣyīmukhadarppaṇaṁ rāyakumāracamatkā
raṁ sāhasāḷaṁkāraṁ kīrttivallarīvaḷayitatriḷōkasatyāvaḷōkaṁ
rājavidyāṁganābhujaṁga Aṇnanasiṁga śrīmattraiḷōkyamallano
ḷaṁbapallavapermmāḍi jayasiṅghadēvar noḷaṁbavāḍi mūva
tticcāsiramuṁ siṁdavāḍi sāsiramumaṁ sukha(ṁ)saṁkatāvinō
dadiṁ rājyageyyuttire kaṁpileya nelevīḍinoḷ sakhavarṣa 990
neya kīlakasaṁvatsarada mārggaśira puṇyame sukravāra sōmagra
haṇanimittadiṁ tuṁbuḷa śrīsvayaṁbhudakṣiṇasōmēśvaradēvargge
mōrakaṇḍiya ḍavakēsvaradayācāryya kāḷāmukhaniraṁjana
pa(ṁ)ṇḍitara sisyaranantasaktipa(ṁ)ṇḍitara sisyar svasti yamaniya
masvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇājapasamādhisaḍaṁgōpahārādisaṁ
pannaramaḷinacaritraranēkatarkkādisāstrapārāvārapāragara
vadāttakīrttidhvajarappa śrīmatu caṁdrabhūṣaṇapa(ṁ)ṇḍitargge
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi mūṟuṇe baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa karbbeḷḷaṁ
varaṁ paḍuva beṭṭaṁbaraṁ taṁka niḍiyakaluvaraṁ biṭṭa bhūmi
mattaru 250 nārāyaṇadēvargge vidyādānakkaṁ biṭṭa
bhūmi mattaru 30 raccavaṟipanneraḍara baḷi karusakuṟu
vamaṁ sarvanamasyaṁ māḍi koṭṭa datti beṭṭadaṇeyakeṟe Oṁdu mane 50
tōṁṭa mattaru 3 gāṇaṁ 4 dēvara Aṁgabhōgakke mattaru 10 caitrakke
mattaru 10 pavitrakke mattaru 10 pūjārige mattaru 10
ghaḷigeya māṇiyargge mattaru 16 pāḷavigaṁge mattaru
12 pātrakke mattaru 12 pāḍuvargge mattaru 10 vaṁsakāṟaṁ
ge mattaru 5 paḍiyaraṁge mattaru 5 mālagāraṁge matta 3 kuṁbāṟaṁge
mattaru 2 . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāḷanīyō
bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
bhadraḥ . priyadi(ṁ)ndiṁtidaneyide kāva purusaṁgāyuṁ mahāśrīyumakke
yida kāyade kāyvī pāpige gurukṣētraṁgaḷoḷu vāraṇāsiyoḷerkkō
ṭṭimunīṁdraraṁ kapileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdudoṁdayasaṁ sārggumideṁdu sāṟi
dapudī saiḷākṣarabrājiyoḷ . sōmagrahaṇanimittavāgi
śrīsvayaṁbhusōmanāthadēvargge gāṇada kottaḷigaḷu ye
nitu gāṇavanitaṟalu naṁdādīvige yaḍḍatu
bayeṇneyaṁ biṭṭa dattiyāraḍḍabiddaḍavargge pāpa .
Digital edition of SII 9.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
